# Test fixtures: layer definitions

These layer-definition files are modeled on code-maat's
`end_to_end/*layers-definition.txt` test resources and exercise the same
`pattern => name` grouping syntax and anchoring rules.

code-maat is licensed GPL-3.0; codelens is GPL-3.0 to permit reuse of its test
corpus as a regression oracle. See `docs/cli-design.md` section 3.
